response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified performers: Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Ookami Mio. 2. Identified song title '咲き誇れアイドル' (Sakihokore Idol) from on-screen text at 02:41 and composer/lyricist metadata. 3. Used web search tool to retrieve the full lyrics for the song using '咲き誇れアイドル HoneyWorks lyrics'. 4. Segmented the video into two parts based on the performers: a group performance (00:00-02:26.500) and a solo performance by Sakura Miko (02:26.501-04:58.300). 5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance of "咲き誇れアイドル" (Sakihokore Idol) at the Sakura Miko Birthday Festival 2026. The performance begins with a group dance featuring Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Ookami Mio, followed by a solo performance by Sakura Miko.

scenes.description: A group performance of the song '咲き誇れアイドル' by Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Ookami Mio. The performers are dancing on a stage decorated for Sakura Miko's birthday festival.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, Ookami Mio
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アイドルだから 挑み続けるんだ
君と夢見るんだ 不器用で悪いか
咲き誇るよ
初のイベント 需要無しデフォ
そんな私が夢を見ました
アイドルという生き方 憧れて

「無敵エリート」「笑顔はチート」
こんな私を見てくれる君
好きなとこはどこですか?
わがままを許して

ステージ経験値 涙滲んで
それでも絶対負けたくない
桜にメッセージ乗せて届け
愛で溢れますように

アイドルだから 挑み続けるんだ
君と夢見るんだ 不器用で悪いか
咲き誇れ
妄想だけじゃ終わらせない
私らしく 桜色 ね

磨いたスキル 実力発揮
楽しめる日も増えてきたんだ
アイドルとして生きてる 君のおかげ

アホ毛はキュート! 勝ち確ルート!
そんな私についてきてよね!
ドジなとこも許されて 最強じゃん!

痛いの言いたいの グッと飲み込んで
笑顔で笑顔増やしたいな
桜前線が君の町に 春を届けるように

アイドルだけは 譲りたくないんだ
君に魅せたいんだ 理想へ挑むよ
駆け抜けろ
最高景色見せてあげる
信じていいよ 桜を

さぁ皆で咲かそう
満開のピンクで世界染めて

あぁこの涙はね
悲しい方じゃないから 安心して
きれいだね

アイドルだから 挑み続けるんだ
君と夢見るんだ 不器用で悪いか
咲き誇れ
妄想だけじゃ終わらせない
私らしく 桜色 ね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Because I'm an idol, I keep trying
Dreaming of you? I'm very happy

First event, demand defaults
I had a dream like that
Idol life, yearning

"Unbeatable elite", "smile cheat"
You look at me like this
Where is your favorite one?
Forgive my selfishness

Stage experience, tears welling up
Still, I absolutely don't want to lose
Put a message on the cherry blossoms and deliver it
May it overflow with love

Because I'm an idol, I keep trying
Dreaming of you? I'm very happy
Bloom

It won't end with just delusions
I'll be myself, cherry blossom color, okay?

Polished skills, demonstrating my true ability
The days I can enjoy have increased
Living as an idol, thanks to you

Aho-ge is cute! The winning route!
Follow me like that!
Even my clumsy parts are forgiven, I'm the strongest, right?

I want to say I'm in pain, gulp it down
I want to increase smiles with my own smile
Like the cherry blossom front delivering spring to your town

I don't want to give up being an idol
I want to charm you, I'll challenge the ideal
Run through it

I'll show you the best scenery
You can believe in the cherry blossoms

Come on, let's all make it bloom
Dye the world in full-bloom pink

Ah, these tears
They aren't from sadness, so don't worry
It's beautiful, isn't it?

Because I'm an idol, I keep trying
Dreaming of you? I'm very happy
Bloom

It won't end with just delusions
I'll be myself, cherry blossom color, okay?

scenes.description: A solo performance of the song '咲き誇れアイドル' by Sakura Miko. She performs center stage in a new outfit.
